title: Coding mock — OpenAI / OOP style
focus: Object-modeling design problem under interview pressure.

items.label: Pick an OOP design problem (Cache, Queue, Rate Limiter)
Walk requirements → classes → methods → extension question
Be ready for a non-standard behavior round + project presentation

interviewQuestions: What classes would you need? What's the interface for each?
How would you extend this to be distributed?
What test cases would you write first?
